title: Small Icons
description: Icons in a smaller font-sized style
body:
[![](https://gistcdn.githack.com/Zartrix/84d5a34dd0fc834c2794a3d46282114a/raw/17b09b8bfbc667ea19b84ccd73690f104cb7e06c/icon.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons)

An addon for [Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons) or [Icons - Menus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-menus) adapting a small, font-sized style for the menu icons.
